_docs: Sample API requests and responses for React frontend integration. Use these as reference for axios/fetch calls.

hiring.description: Predict if a job candidate should be hired

sample_response_hired.explanation: Hired — candidate shows strong technical score (82/100), strong communication score (75/100), 5 years of experience.

metrics.note: Single-prediction fairness is logged. Batch metrics are computed from historical data.

fairness.ethical_note: Sensitive attributes are used ONLY to monitor fairness. They are NOT inputs to the prediction model.

sample_response_rejected.explanation: Not hired — low technical score (35/100), limited experience (1 years).

fairness.ethical_note: Sensitive attributes are used ONLY to monitor fairness.

loan.description: Predict if a loan application should be approved

sample_response_approved.explanation: Loan approved — good credit score (720), manageable debt-to-income ratio (11%), 4 years of stable employment.

fairness.ethical_note: Sensitive attributes are used ONLY to monitor fairness.

sample_response_rejected.explanation: Loan rejected — low credit score (480, minimum 600 recommended); high debt-to-income ratio (72%).

fairness.ethical_note: Sensitive attributes are used ONLY to monitor fairness.

social.description: Recommend a content category based on user behavior

sample_response.explanation: Recommended 'Technology & Science' based on your engagement patterns, primarily driven by high content engagement (like_rate: 0.65). This recommendation is based on behavior only, not personal attributes.

fairness.ethical_note: Sensitive attributes are used ONLY to monitor fairness.

react_axios_example._comment: Paste this into your React component
react_axios_example.code: const response = await axios.post('https://quantum-ai-backend.onrender.com/hiring/predict', formData); const { prediction_label, explanation, fairness } = response.data;

detail.msg: Input should be greater than or equal to 300

model_not_found_503.error: hiring_model.pkl not found at 'models/hiring_model.pkl'. Please place the model file in the /models directory.
